title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and M.G. Siegler discuss Anthropic's IPO filing. They examine strategic implications of the company going public before OpenAI, assess Claude's competitive position, and consider the company's capital needs.
